seoTitle: Boobyalla vs Bothwell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Boobyalla and Bothwell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boobyalla and Bothwell.
heading: Boobyalla vs Bothwell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boobyalla, Tasmania and Bothwell, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boobyalla has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Bothwell (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boobyalla or Bothwell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boobyalla has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Bothwell scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boobyalla scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Bothwell scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boobyalla or Bothwell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boobyalla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
